headline: Marqeta (NASDAQ:MQ) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Payment technology company Marqeta (NASDAQ:MQ) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 19.2% year on year to $165.8 million. Its GAAP profit of $0.02 per share was $0.02 above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Unlocking Q1 Potential of Block (XYZ): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Block (XYZ), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead
summary: Traders on prediction market platforms give a high probability to layoffs in the tech sector reaching more than 447,000 jobs in 2026.

headline: Coinbase cuts headcount by 14% citing AI acceleration
summary: Coinbase will cut roughly 14% of its workforce, citing a combination of market volatility and the how AI is quickly changing how the company operates.
